label: Strategy Classification
definition: Classification of vendor strategic position or decision

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Verified real-world outcome via external research

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Technical evaluation of capabilities or positioning

label: Framework Factor
definition: Structural environmental factor (key success factors etc.)

label: High
definition: Multiple corroborating sources or vendor data

label: Medium
definition: Single source or inferred from context

label: Expert Survey
definition: Aberdeen analyst field survey and expert interviews

label: Case Study
definition: Anonymous enterprise case study from Aberdeen fieldwork

label: Vendor Claim
definition: Specification or assertion provided by vendor
